title: Recruiting Coordinator
description: Vanguard is seeking a Recruiting Coordinator to support our talent acquisition efforts in the Chicago region. You'll manage the recruiting calendar, communicate with candidates, and support the hiring team in building diverse, talented teams. This role offers great exposure to human resources and talent management in a company known for its people-first culture.
responsibilities: Schedule interviews, coordinate candidate communication, and prepare interview materials
Maintain recruiting database and pipeline; track candidate status throughout hiring process
Prepare offer letters, onboarding documentation, and candidate correspondence
Assist with job posting distribution and applicant tracking system management
Support recruiting events and campus recruiting initiatives

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree preferred, or equivalent recruiting/administrative experience
skills: Proficiency with applicant tracking systems and recruiting databases
Attention to detail and ability to follow processes
Ability to interact professionally with diverse candidates

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
